The user is experiencing an issue where when editing parameters in the "Add tool" dialog in `src/app/tools/page.tsx`, the screen keeps scrolling up when trying to edit fields that are below the original field of view.

This is a common issue that can occur due to several reasons:
1. React re-renders causing scroll position to reset
2. State updates triggering focus loss
3. The sidebar's overflow container losing scroll position during re-renders

Let me look at the code more carefully to understand what might be causing this.

1. The sidebar has `overflow-y-auto` on line 1165 for the content area
2. When parameters are updated via `handleUpdateAtPath`, `handleAddPropertyAtPath`, etc., these call `setParameters` which updates state
3. Each `ParameterCard` component uses onChange handlers that update state
